Info.title: Information
Info.subtitle1: Discover our cuisine crafted with seasonal and local products.
Info.subtitle2: Our menu is designed to be convivial, gourmet, and gastronomic.
Info.hours_value:
Open Tuesday to Saturday
12:00 PM to 1:30 PM / 7:30 PM to 9:30 PM
Closed Wednesday lunch.
Closed Sunday and Monday.

Story.title: Our Story
Story.p1: Located in the historic heart of Bordeaux, facing the Grosse Cloche and a stone's throw from Place Fernand Lafargue,
Story.p2: « Les Négociants » is the realization of the dream of two restaurant enthusiasts, Florian and Julien.
Story.p3: Our establishment stands out with a concept blending tasting, sophistication, and conviviality, offering a flavorful and most gourmet culinary experience.
Story.p4: At « Les Négociants », we make it a point of honor to work with fresh and seasonal products, carefully selected to guarantee exceptional quality in every dish. Our bistronomic cuisine will delight the most demanding palates while respecting the authenticity and richness of the ingredients.
Story.p5: Our wine list, meticulously crafted with 250 references, reflects our love for wine and our desire to make you discover viticultural treasures. Each bottle has been chosen to enhance your meal and offer you a perfect pairing.
Story.p6: Join us at Les Négociants and let yourself be seduced by our universe.

MenuCarte.title: A LA CARTE MENU
MenuCarte.subtitle: ( Served only in the EVENING from Tuesday to Saturday )
MenuCarte.description: With our chef Antoine and his assistant Louis, we offer a bistronomic cuisine with fresh and seasonal products. Enjoy French cuisine and the passion of our chef, driven by the pleasure of playing with textures and product variations.

MenuWeek.title: OUR WEEKLY MENU
MenuWeek.subtitle: ( LUNCH only from Tuesday to Saturday )

Gallery.title: SOME DISHES FROM THE MENU
Gallery.privatization_info: Our lounge in total immersion in the wine cellar can be privatized for any type of event: up to 20 people for privatization
Gallery.terrace_info: Our terrace, shaded or sunny, it's up to you!

FindUs.title: Find Us
FindUs.description: Find us in the heart of Bordeaux at 3 rue de Guienne, near Place Fernand Lafargue and admire the Grosse Cloche from " LES NÉGOCIANTS "

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.description: Do you have questions, suggestions, or comments? We would be delighted to hear from you! Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
